ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent on which the country is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the country */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the region is located */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_farms" (
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind farm record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the wind farm is located */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the wind farm is located */,
  "total_farms" INTEGER /* Total number of wind farms in the country */,
  "onshore" INTEGER /* Number of onshore wind farms */,
  "offshore" INTEGER /* Number of offshore wind farms */,
  "capacity_mw" REAL /* Total capacity in megawatts (MW) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of installation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("farm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wind_farms_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wind_farms_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wind farm associated with the project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Project start date */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Project completion date */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of the project (e.g., new installation, upgrade) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES wind_farms ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "turbines" (
  "turbine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turbine */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wind farm where the turbine is located */,
  "turbine_model" TEXT /* Model of the turbine */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of installation */,
  "capacity_mw" REAL /* Capacity of the turbine in megawatts (MW) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turbine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wind farm associated with the metrics */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded metrics */,
  "energy_produced" REAL /* Total energy produced in megawatt-hours (MWh) */,
  "downtime_hours" REAL /* Total hours of downtime */,
  "availability" REAL /* Availability of the wind farm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES wind_farms ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the organization (e.g., manager, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions assigned to this role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "data" TEXT /* JSON object containing report data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with the compliance record */,
  "requirement" TEXT /* Description of the regulatory requirement */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for compliance */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory body */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_compliance_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wind farm where maintenance was performed */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of maintenance work completed */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, corrective) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES wind_farms ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy sale record */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wind farm associated with the sale */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "energy_amount" REAL /* Total energy sold in megawatt-hours (MWh) */,
  "price_per_mwh" REAL /* Price per MWh for the sale */,
  "buyer" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_sales_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES wind_farms ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investors" (
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the investor or firm */,
  "investment_amount" REAL /* Total amount invested in projects */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the investor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the investor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., investment, expense) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., bank transfer, credit card) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_transactions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing the feedback */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification record */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wind farm associated with the certification */,
  "certification_name" TEXT /* Name of the certification */,
  "issuance_date" TEXT /* Date of issuance */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date of expiration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certifications_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES wind_farms ("farm_id")
)
